hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx) npx eslint --fix "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
if command -v graphify >/dev/null 2>&1; then graphify hook-guard search; else cat >/dev/null; fi
if command -v graphify >/dev/null 2>&1; then graphify hook-guard read; else cat >/dev/null; fi
